item.title: Micromed S.p.A.: SD LTM 64 PLUS, EEG Amplifier/recorder, Model/Catalog Number: SD LTM 64 PLUS, Software Version: firmware 2021.02, 2022.01 or 2022.02 Recall
item.product: SD LTM 64 PLUS, EEG Amplifier/recorder, Model/Catalog Number: SD LTM 64 PLUS, Software Version: firmware 2021.02, 2022.01 or 2022.02
item.summary: Natus has become aware of two complaints related to the SD LTM 64 PLUS where the EEG traces acquired from two or four different amplifiers used in a multiple amplifier configuration (128 or 256 channels) running firmware version 2022.02 were displayed with a shift of 1 second between the 64channels blocks. In rare circumstances, a fixed 1-second temporal delay may appear between two 64-channel modules with firmware 2021.02, 2022.01 or 2022.02 in a multi-module SEEG configuration, potentially leading to misinterpretation of results. Product details: SD LTM 64 PLUS, EEG Amplifier/recorder, Model/Catalog Number: SD LTM 64 PLUS, Software Version: firmware 2021.02, 2022.01 or 2022.02
item.affectedPeople: Worldwide - US Nationwide distribution in the states of FL, PA.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
